coverage: 93029/93029 modern text keys; build 3062823 adds 2 keys, removes 2 keys and changes 28 English sources; all 30 affected rows are translated and reviewed; 5 technical zeros confirmed
install_hint: Run Aniimo-Italian-Translation.exe, press Enter, then select English in game. The installer keeps the English text slot, assigns Aniimo's bundled Vietnamese font, changes every verified visible date to DD/MM/YYYY, and replaces the built-in CJK countdown units with h/m/s. If automatic detection fails, place the EXE next to Aniimo_Data.
notes: The default installation uses the visible English text slot and redirects only its font to Aniimo's bundled Vietnamese font.
The public translation uses standard Italian spelling and real accented letters.
Every verified visible date surface is generated dynamically and reordered locally to DD/MM/YYYY, including quest chapters, mail, albums, photo details and event panels.
The built-in CJK countdown labels used by shop cards are replaced locally with the neutral h/m/s abbreviations without changing metadata offsets.
Both the downloaded Lua overlay and the base runtime archive are backed up, patched independently and verified before installation.
The language audit compares every modern official locale and recovers meaningful entries stored as zero in the English slot.
Build 3053563 uses the verified font bundle c3aa9ce8cbbd8c1c6f9a26b09d202ad9; the English slot is still redirected to Aniimo's bundled Vietnamese font for complete Italian accents.
Build 3053563 is verified by its package version, 93029-key fingerprint, and official active Lua overlay SHA-256; the diagnostic verlist digest is not treated as the compatibility authority.
Build 3058113 keeps the same 93029 keys and English contents; it is accepted by the automatic content check and its active Lua overlay SHA-256 is recorded for diagnostics only.
Build 3062823 keeps 93029 total keys but adds 2 keys, removes 2 keys and changes 28 English sources; every affected row has been translated and reviewed.
Compatibility is determined automatically from the full key set and the actual English/Italian text contents; an unseen build with unchanged localization is accepted without adding its build number.
New or changed official text values are rejected until reviewed, even when the total key count remains unchanged.
The installer builds patched resources locally from the user owned game files; this repository does not include original game archives.
